creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Comment on attachment 237465
darling-dmg.shar

>#!/bin/sh
># This is a shell archive
>echo x darling-dmg
>mkdir -p darling-dmg > /dev/null 2>&1
>echo x darling-dmg/Makefile
>sed 's/^X//' > darling-dmg/Makefile << 'SHAR_END'
>X# $FreeBSD$
>X
>XPORTNAME=	darling-dmg
>XPORTVERSION=	g20221019
>XCATEGORIES=	sysutils
>X
>XMAINTAINER=	freebsd@sysctl.cz
>XCOMMENT=	FUSE module for .dmg files (containing an HFS+ filesystem
>X
>XLICENSE=	GPLv3
>XLICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE
>X
>XUSES=		cmake fuse
>XUSE_GNOME=	libxml2
>XLIB_DEPENDS=	libicuuc.so:devel/icu
>X
>XUSE_GITHUB=	yes
>XGH_ACCOUNT=	darlinghq
>XGH_PROJECT=	darling-dmg
>XGH_TAGNAME=	8a2831
>X
>X.include <bsd.port.mk>
>SHAR_END
>echo x darling-dmg/distinfo
>sed 's/^X//' > darling-dmg/distinfo << 'SHAR_END'
>XTIMESTAMP = 1666204751
>XSHA256 (darlinghq-darling-dmg-g20221019-8a2831_GH0.tar.gz) = 3e6cad04474492469a6095111d490063860b9e47860243cafebd51874c614371
>XSIZE (darlinghq-darling-dmg-g20221019-8a2831_GH0.tar.gz) = 55868
>SHAR_END
>echo x darling-dmg/pkg-descr
>sed 's/^X//' > darling-dmg/pkg-descr << 'SHAR_END'
>X[description of the port]
>X
>XWWW: http://example.com
>SHAR_END
>echo x darling-dmg/pkg-plist
>sed 's/^X//' > darling-dmg/pkg-plist << 'SHAR_END'
>Xbin/darling-dmg
>Xlib/libdmg.so
>X
>SHAR_END
>echo x darling-dmg/files
>mkdir -p darling-dmg/files > /dev/null 2>&1
>echo x darling-dmg/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
>sed 's/^X//' > darling-dmg/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt << 'SHAR_END'
>X--- CMakeLists.txt.orig	2019-07-20 22:33:49 UTC
>X+++ CMakeLists.txt
>X@@ -41,7 +41,12 @@ set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_MODULE_PATH}
>X 	"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake_modules/")
>X 
>X add_definitions(-D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64)
>X-SET(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -std=c++11 -ggdb -O0")
>X+SET(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -std=c++11")
>X+
>X+if(${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME} MATCHES FreeBSD)
>X+    include_directories("/usr/local/include")
>X+    link_directories("/usr/local/lib")
>X+endif()
>X 
>X include(FindLibxml2)
>X 
>SHAR_END
>exit
